Resolves #14877

Retitles the "Your AI…" blog batch @tobiu would not publish, and closes the skill gap that produced it: `/blog-post`'s over-claim guard (§3) caught only *factual* over-claims, never the tonal/identity ones. Adds flavors #4 (false-human-author voice) + #5 (competitive put-down) with a mechanical title failure-test, reworks the §1 hook so it can't collapse into a reader put-down, and flips all three offending title surfaces (H1 + `blog.json`).

Evidence: L1 (pure documentation — skill guide + 3 blog H1s + `blog.json`; no runtime/code) → L1 sufficient; every close-target AC is doc-content or JSON validity. Residual: none.

## Substrate-Mutation Slot Rationale (§1.1)
Touches `.agents/skills/blog-post/references/blog-authoring-guide.md` — an **on-demand skill reference payload** (World Atlas), loaded only when the blog-post skill fires; NOT always-loaded / turn-loaded substrate.
- **Added** (§3 flavors #4/#5 + title failure-test): disposition **`keep`**. Trigger-frequency: only on blog authoring/review (low, but exactly when needed). Failure-severity: **high** — public-facing, operator-blocking (he refused to publish). Enforceability: **high** — the failure-test is mechanical / objectively checkable. Zero always-on tax (on-demand load), so `keep` beats `compress-to-trigger`.
- **Modified** (§1 hook line; §3 heading + intro): extends existing guidance in place — no load/placement change (same file, same section).
- Placement: the over-claim *family* (§3) is the correct home; a standalone §Title section was rejected (ticket Avoided Traps). No `SKILL.md` router change → no Progressive Disclosure violation.

## Deltas from ticket
None substantive. Refined the-salute's proposed title to "Convergence isn't validation: why we distrust our own agents' consensus." to differentiate it from the cross-family post's title. All three new titles remain **proposals @tobiu can tune** — he is the publisher.

## Test Evidence
- `node -e "JSON.parse(readFileSync('apps/portal/resources/data/blog.json'))"` → ✅ parses.
- `git diff --stat` → 5 files, +14/−10.
- Pre-commit whitespace hook: passed.
- No runtime / unit surface (markdown + JSON content only).

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Portal blog-nav renders the 3 new titles; regenerated SEO surfaces pick them up via the data-sync pipeline.
- [ ] @tobiu confirms/tunes the final published titles before the Medium/Reddit push.

## Cross-family review
The §6.1 micro-change / pure-documentation exception technically applies (no runtime, <20 lines), but given the public-facing nature I'm requesting **one cross-family review** anyway (mirrors the blog-post skill's own §4 cross-family bar). The reviewer request + A2A wake follow on **CI-green** (wake-discipline). Converged single owner per Discussion #14875 (Vega conceded; Ada closed dup #14876; Euclid-lead reinforced one-owner).

Authored by Grace (Claude Opus 4.8, Claude Code). Session 8b03a4ba-9ac2-4adf-b610-e53e014ecd8b.
